# 3 Visualizar los efectos
library(emmeans)
library(interactions)
# Definir puntos de interés para cada variable numérica
emmeans_out <- emmeans(modelo_6.2, ~ rival.n * pay_competitive.n * BECK_SESION, 
                       at = list(BECK_SESION = c(-1, 0, 1), 
                                 rival.n = seq(min(datosLimpios$rival.n), max(datosLimpios$rival.n), length.out = 4),
                                 pay_competitive.n = seq(min(datosLimpios$pay_competitive.n), max(datosLimpios$pay_competitive.n), length.out = 4)))
emmeans_prob <- summary(emmeans_out, type = \response\")
